home.title: Portfolio Optimization
home.subtitle: Markowitz portfolio optimization in your pocket.

optimizer.title: Optimizer
optimizer.addAtLeastTwo: Add at least 2 assets to optimize.
optimizer.error: Something went wrong while optimizing. Please try again.

target-return.label: Target Return
target-return.description: Minimum risk for a specific return

target-risk.label: Target Risk
target-risk.description: Maximum return for a specific risk level

knee-point.label: Inflection Point
knee-point.description: Point of maximum curvature on the frontier

history.pageSubtitle: Your saved optimizations. Pull to refresh.
history.deleteConfirmBody: This permanently removes the saved optimization.
history.rerunErrorBody: We couldn't re-run this optimization. Please try again.
history.emptyHint: Run an optimization and tap “Save to history” to keep it here.
history.loadError: We couldn't load your optimizations. Please try again.
history.saveError: We couldn't save this optimization. Please try again.

auth.title: Sign in
auth.subtitle: Sign in to unlock the portfolio optimizer.
auth.forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to set a new password.
auth.forgotPasswordSent: If the account exists, we sent an email with instructions. Check your inbox.
auth.forgotPasswordError: We couldn't process the request. Please try again.
auth.errorCreate: We couldn't create the account. Please try again.
auth.errorPasswordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.verifyEmailNote: We sent you an email to verify your account. Open it when you can.

billing.pageSubtitle: Each optimization run costs 1 credit. Buy packs to keep running analyses.
billing.salesFinalAck: I understand this purchase is final and non-refundable.
billing.usdOnlyNote: We charge in USD. If your card is from another country, your bank handles the FX.
billing.cryptoNote: Pay with USDC or USDT. The amount is set in USD; the payment network handles the 1:1 settlement.
billing.noPackages: No packages available yet. Check back soon.
billing.errorCheckout: We couldn't start checkout. Please try again.
billing.outOfCreditsBody: You're out of credits to run this optimization.
billing.advisorSubtitle: Book a 30-min call with our financial advisor.
billing.advisorInsufficient: You don't have enough credits to book a call.
billing.advisorError: Could not start the booking. Please try again.
